settings.heading: Application review
settings.text: The wholesale team reviews your business information and eligibility.

settings.heading: Receive wholesale access
settings.text: Approved retailers can sign in to view prices and purchase products.

settings.heading: Wholesale account
settings.introduction: Sign in to review your wholesale application and access status.
settings.signed_out_heading: Sign in to check your access
settings.signed_out_text: Use the email associated with your retailer account to sign in and review your wholesale status.
settings.not_applied_text: Your customer account is active, but it does not currently have a wholesale application status.
settings.pending_text: Your retailer application has been received. Wholesale prices and purchasing will remain locked until approval.
settings.approved_text: You can now view wholesale pricing, purchase individual products, and build complete collection bundles.
settings.rejected_text: Please contact the wholesale team if you have questions or need to update your retailer information.
